data.title: ISX Financial renews sponsorship with APOEL FC through 2025-2027 seasons in Nicosia, providing banking and payments tech support.
data.description: Today in Nicosia, Cyprus, ISX Financial EU Plc (ISXX) revealed the extension of its sponsorship deal with APOEL FC, a renowned football club. The company, a regulated Electronic Money Institution, offers transactional banking and real-time payments technology in Europe and the UK. This partnership renewal underscores their commitment to supporting APOEL FC.

data.title: FedEx beats Q1 revenue estimates, reporting $22.2 billion vs $21.67 billion. Adjusted earnings soar to $3.83 per share.QtCoreFedEx projects 4-6% revenue growth for fiscal 2026.
data.description: FedEx Corporation (NYSE: FDX) exceeded expectations in its first-quarter fiscal 2026 financial results. The company announced a revenue of $22.2 billion, surpassing analyst projections of $21.67 billion. Adjusted earnings for the quarter were $3.83 per share, beating estimates of $3.62 per share. With a daily package movement of 17 million through its network, CEO Raj Subramaniam attributed the success to strategic initiatives and operational capabilities. Moving forward, FedEx anticipates a 4-6% increase in revenue for fiscal 2026. More details are available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Johnson & Wales University introduces 3-year (90 credit) Hospitality Management degree in Charlotte. Apply for Fall 2026.
data.description: Johnson & Wales University (JWU) in Charlotte, North Carolina, announced on September 19, 2025, that it is accepting applications for its new three-year bachelor's degree program in Hospitality Management for the Fall 2026 term. The program, totaling 90 credits, is being offered at the university's Charlotte Campus. Interested students can now apply to be a part of this innovative program designed to equip them with the necessary skills and knowledge for a successful career in the hospitality industry.

data.title: Kimberly Wagner named AVP Product & Underwriting at Preferred Employers Insurance, a Berkley company, with 25+ years experience.
data.description: Preferred Employers Insurance, a Berkley company based in San Diego, has recently appointed Kimberly Wagner as their new Assistant Vice President of Product & Underwriting. Wagner comes with a wealth of experience in the industry, boasting over 25 years of expertise in underwriting, operations, and product development. This move is set to enhance the company's leadership team and strengthen their capabilities in these crucial areas.

data.title: Inventor creates "LADDER PAD" for safer ladder transport. Prevents stress, pain, injuries. - Pittsburg, Sep 19, 2025.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on September 19, 2025, an inventor from Henderson, Nevada shared the inspiration behind the creation of the LADDER PAD. This innovative product was designed to provide a safer and more comfortable method for carrying a ladder on the shoulder. The inventor aimed to address the issues of stress, pain, and potential injuries that often accompany traditional ladder transportation. This new design has the potential to improve the carrying experience for individuals, potentially reducing the number of ladder-related injuries and discomfort.

data.title: Optimism price forecast: $0.88 resistance likely tested by October 2025, aiming at $0.96 with $0.65 support critical.
data.description: Positive outlook is being challenged by a significant resistance level at $0.88, as buyers increase momentum. Experts forecast a potential price surge to $0.96 if the resistance is surpassed, but emphasize the importance of the $0.65 support level.

data.title: CiCLO® Technology wins 2025 Home Excellence Behind the Seams Award for efforts in tackling microplastic pollution.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, in Gastonia, North Carolina, Intrinsic Advanced Materials (IAM) revealed that CiCLO® Technology was honored with the 2025 Home Excellence Behind the Seams Award by the Home Fashion Products Association (HFPA). This recognition showcases IAM's dedication to innovation and excellence in the field, solidifying its position as a leader in the industry.

data.title: Arbitrum's price target: $0.43-$0.56 range with $0.47 critical support for bullish momentum in Oct 2025. (More details)
data.description: According to a recent analysis, it is predicted that the price of ARB will undergo a period of consolidation ranging between $0.43 and $0.56. It is noted that maintaining immediate support at $0.47 is crucial for sustaining a bullish trend leading up to October 2025.

data.title: Wall Street analysts expect Cintas Corporation to report Q1 earnings at $1.2 per share, up from $1.1 last year. Revenue estimated at $2.7 billion, up from $2.5 billion. Company raised quarterly cash dividend from 39 cents to 45 cents. Stock closed at $199.51.
data.description: Cintas Corporation (NASDAQ: CTAS) is set to release its first-quarter earnings on Wednesday, Sept. 24, before the market opens. Analysts are forecasting earnings of $1.20 per share for the Cincinnati, Ohio-based company, representing an increase from $1.10 per share in the same period last year. Quarterly revenue is expected to be $2.7 billion, up from $2.5 billion a year ago, as reported by Benzinga Pro. Cintas recently boosted its quarterly dividend from 39 cents to 45 cents on July 29. The company's shares closed at $199.51 on Thursday, experiencing a slight 0.2% decline. For further insights into analyst ratings and updates, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga.

data.title: BoE keeps interest rate at 4% due to high inflation, slow growth. US, Canada cut rates; BoE MPC voted 7-2 against a cut. UK inflation at 3.8%, unemployment at 4.7%. BoE plans to slow QT program. Full story on Benzinga.com.
data.description: The Bank of England (BoE) has chosen to maintain its key interest rate at 4%, despite inflation staying above target and slow economic growth. The Monetary Policy Committee voted 7-2 in favor of holding the rate, with two members advocating for a 0.25 percentage point cut. UK's inflation remains high at 3.8%, the highest among advanced economies, while unemployment remains at 4.7%. The BoE also plans to slow its quantitative tightening program and reduce government bond sales from £100 billion to £70 billion annually. The UK's decision contrasts with the US and Canadian central banks cutting rates to prevent labor market erosion. The BoE is closely monitoring inflation and job market dynamics for future policy decisions.

data.title: BTC price could hit $110K with $4.9T options expiry looming, amidst rising bid liquidity and downward predictions.
data.description: Bitcoin is facing new downward price predictions following an options expiry event, with bid liquidity on exchange order books increasing. The current situation has raised concerns among investors, with BTC expected to experience a significant drop in value. This comes as Bitcoin continues to face volatility in the market, with experts forecasting a potential decrease in price by a considerable margin in the near future.

data.title: Phillips partners with Irving Penn Foundation for unprecedented auction in Oct featuring 70 works of exceptional provenance.
data.description: In October, Phillips will be hosting an exceptional sale and exhibition featuring 70 works of remarkable provenance and significance in New York. The event, titled Visual Language: The Art of Irving Penn, is set to showcase pieces from The Irving Penn Foundation. This landmark auction highlights the acclaimed artist's work, with a collection of pieces that are expected to draw significant attention. Scheduled for fall, the sale is anticipated to attract art enthusiasts and collectors alike, with a diverse range of artworks up for bidding.
